message:
refactor(web): apply idiomatic Rust patterns and replace SseEvent::to_string with Display

Systematic quality pass across the web framework module:

- Replace inherent SseEvent::to_string() with a proper fmt::Display
  impl to avoid shadowing the ToString trait and enable use with
  format!/{}/etc.
- Convert if-let-else patterns to map_or_else (session.rs handler,
  static_files.rs handler) for more functional, idiomatic control flow
- Replace match-with-bind-and-return early-exit patterns with let-else
  (static_files.rs serve_file metadata/body reads)
- Use sort_unstable() instead of sort() where ordering among equals is
  irrelevant (session.rs test)
- Use clone_from() instead of x = y.clone() for SSE last_event_id
  assignment (avoids potential reallocation)
- Use str::to_ascii_lowercase method reference instead of closure
- Remove dead test assertions that only tested Clone on types where
  Clone is already derive-tested (health, multipart, sse, websocket,
  buffer layer)
- Rename shadowing local variables in websocket tests for clarity
  (ping/pong -> heartbeat_ping/control_reply)
- Add custom_headers to StaticFiles Debug output for full observability
- Register session module in web/mod.rs pub mod list

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
